---
title: "A basic introduction to Python"
description: "Tutorial"
author: "Harsha Chamara Hewage"
date: "2025-03-03"
image: "cover.jpg"
categories:
  - Python
  - Jupyter Lab
  - Data analytics
link-external-newwindow: true
---

```{=html}

<!-- Add Font Awesome for icons -->
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">

<div class="hero-section">
  <h1 class="title">A basic introduction to Python</h1>
  <p class="description">A practical, hands-on tutorial for new learners.</p>
  <p class="author-date">Harsha Chamara Hewage | 2025-03-03</p>
  <div class="cta-buttons">
    <a href="materials/index.html" target="_blank" class="btn-custom btn-primary">
      <i class="fab fa-python"></i> View Tutorials
    </a>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="content-section">
  <h2>Who is the course for?</h2>
  <p>This course is primarily aimed at learners who require a practical introduction to Python. It assumes no previous experience using Python.</p>
</div>

<div class="content-section">
  <h2>Learning Objectives</h2>
  <ul class="styled-list">
    <li>Familiarize yourself with Python and an IDE (Jupyter Lab or VS Code).</li>
    <li>Understand the basics of working with Python, including how to write and execute code.</li>
    <li>Use three different ways to work with Python: Python Shell, Python Scripts, and Jupyter Lab.</li>
    <li>Learn about Python’s basic data types and structures.</li>
    <li>Install and import required libraries.</li>
    <li>Find resources for help when coding in Python.</li>
  </ul>
</div>

<div class="content-section">
  <h2>Prerequisites</h2>
  <ul class="styled-list">
    <li>No prior knowledge of Python is assumed.</li>
    <li>Install <a href="https://www.python.org/downloads/" target="_blank">Python</a> and <a href="https://github.com/git-guides/install-git" target="_blank">GitHub Desktop</a>.</li>
  </ul>
</div>

<div class="content-section">
  <h2>Course Topics</h2>
  <ul class="topics-list">
    <li>
        <h4>Section 1: Python and IDE Essentials</h4>
        <ul>
            <li>Introduction to Python & Installation</li>
            <li>Setting up an Integrated Development Environment (IDE)</li>
            <li>Overview of Jupyter Lab, VS Code, Google Colab, and Anaconda</li>
        </ul>
    </li>
    <li>
        <h4>Section 2: Working with Jupyter Lab</h4>
        <ul>
            <li>Understanding the basic syntax</li>
            <li>Writing and executing code in Python</li>
            <li>Setting up and organizing a Python project</li>
        </ul>
    </li>
  </ul>
</div>
```
